tools.name: assets.balance
tools.description: Show latest Banksalad overview balance rows.

tools.name: assets.show
tools.description: Show detailed holdings.

tools.name: assets.status
tools.description: Show asset portfolio overview.

tools.name: audit.clear
tools.description: Clear audit log (keep last 100 entries).

tools.name: audit.log
tools.description: Display audit log of command executions.

type.description: Filter by event type (e.g., command_suggested, command_executed)

tools.name: audit.stats
tools.description: Show audit log statistics.

tools.name: automation.run
tools.description: Run one one-shot automation pass using config-backed thresholds.

privacy.description: Privacy profile for JSON output: raw, redacted, or compact

output_schema.description: automation run --json output. The raw and redacted privacy profiles include data_dir and merchant_pressure samples; compact replaces those samples with counts.

tools.name: budget.edit
tools.description: Edit monthly budget values in goals.yaml while preserving comments.

set.description: Update one field in goals.yaml. Use total=..., categories.<name>=..., monthly_budget.categories.<name>=..., or bare category names such as 식비=700000.

tools.name: budget.status
tools.description: Show monthly budget targets vs actual spending.

tools.name: budget.validate
tools.description: Validate goals.yaml against the monthly_budget schema.

tools.name: checkup
tools.description: Emit the recommended read-only runtime snapshot for agent inspect/decide loops.

privacy.description: Privacy profile for JSON output: raw, redacted, or compact

stale_after.description: Days after which data is considered stale (default: 35)

output_schema.description: checkup --json output. The raw and redacted privacy profiles include data_dir; compact omits that path while preserving workflow-driving summary fields.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Emit a read-only context bundle for external AI agents.

journal.description: Number of newest journal entries to include (default: 3).

budget.description: Token budget for the emitted context. Default: FINJUICE_CONTEXT_BUDGET if set, else 5000. --budget overrides the env var.

verbose.description: Write the section-by-section token breakdown to stderr.

json.description: Emit structured JSON instead of the default text summary.

tools.name: doctor
tools.description: Diagnose environment and identify issues.

tools.name: explain
tools.description: Explain the classification of a transaction.

query.description: Search term to find transaction (e.g. merchant name)

tools.name: export
tools.description: Generate master XLSX, HTML, and/or Markdown reports.

format.description: Export format: xlsx, html, md, all

online.description: Load Plotly.js from CDN (default: offline/embedded for privacy)

tools.name: history
tools.description: Display import history log.

tools.name: import
tools.description: Import XLSX files and run full pipeline.

files.description: XLSX or ZIP file(s) to import. Pass one or more paths, or use --file for a single XLSX.

file.description: XLSX file to import without prompts.

dry_run.description: Preview what would be imported without processing

no_scan.description: Disable auto-scan of ~/Downloads for Banksalad files

password.description: Password for encrypted ZIP files. If not provided, prompts interactively.

tools.name: index
tools.description: Emit an agent-friendly workspace collection catalog.

privacy.description: Privacy profile for JSON output: raw, redacted, or compact.

include_paths.description: Include resolved local filesystem paths in the catalog.

output_schema.description: index --json output. The raw privacy profile preserves the full catalog shape and only includes paths when --include-paths is requested. Redacted and compact profiles suppress resolved workspace and collection paths; compact also drops operational command and note detail.

tools.name: ingest
tools.description: Import XLSX files from imports/ directory into CSV partitions.

from_archive.description: Re-import from archived file by file_id (e.g., '241027_1')

archive.description: Copy source XLSX files to metadata/archives/ for reproducibility

dry_run.description: Preview changes without writing to CSV files

tools.name: init
tools.description: Initialize directory structure (advanced setup).

with_agents.description: Include AGENTS.md for AI tool integration (Codex, Gemini, Cursor)

save_config.description: Save this location to config file (~/.finjuice/config.toml)

tools.name: inspect.xlsx
tools.description: Inspect workbook structure without exposing raw financial cell values.

tools.name: journal.list
tools.description: List journal entries sorted newest first.

tools.name: journal.new
tools.description: Create a journal entry with snapshot front matter.

topic.description: Journal topic slug. Defaults to an auto-generated session topic.

no_gitignore_check.description: Skip the local gitignore safety prompt.

tools.name: journal.resume
tools.description: Resolve the latest or matching journal entry.

slug_or_date.description: Newest entry by default, or match by filename substring / exact YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: manifest
tools.description: Emit a machine-readable manifest of the finjuice CLI.

commands_only.description: Emit compact command discovery data only.

tools.name: networth
tools.description: View aggregated net worth from asset snapshots plus assets.yaml. Use `finjuice assets` for raw snapshot rows.

tools.name: networth.breakdown
tools.description: Show aggregated asset breakdown by category or asset.

by.description: Break down by category or asset

tools.name: networth.forecast
tools.description: Project net worth under deterministic scenario assumptions.

tools.name: networth.history
tools.description: Show monthly net worth history from available snapshots.

tools.name: networth.init
tools.description: Create a starter assets.yaml from the built-in template.

tools.name: networth.validate
tools.description: Validate assets.yaml and report line-numbered errors.

tools.name: open
tools.description: Open data directories or files in file manager/editor.

target.description: Target: . imports exports reports transactions/tx rules master

tools.name: query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query on your transaction data.

output.description: Output format: table, csv, json, markdown

max_bytes.description: Maximum serialized JSON response size before truncating rows

tools.name: refresh
tools.description: Re-process all existing data (ingest → tag → transfer → export).

tools.name: review
tools.description: Show transactions that need manual review.

all_history.description: Review matching transactions across all available monthly partitions

max_bytes.description: Maximum serialized JSON response size before truncating transactions

privacy.description: Privacy profile for JSON output: raw, redacted, or compact

output_schema.description: review --json output. The raw and redacted privacy profiles keep full rule note shape; compact rule notes omit merchant-derived rule names and free-text notes.

tools.name: rules.add
tools.description: Add or update a tagging rule programmatically.

tools.name: rules.export
tools.description: Export tagging rules as Banksalad category mapping guide.

tools.name: rules.gaps
tools.description: Analyze gaps between tags and Banksalad categories.

top.description: Number of items to show per category

actionable_only.description: Hide low-signal mismatch noise and show only actionable gaps

tools.name: rules.list
tools.description: List tagging rules as structured JSON or a compact table.

tools.name: rules.remove
tools.description: Remove a tagging rule by name.

tools.name: rules.suggest
tools.description: Suggest rule patterns with rich merchant context.

min_count.description: Minimum transaction count for a merchant (default: 1)

output.description: Save merchant context report to file

apply.description: Interactively apply suggested rules to rules.yaml

yes.description: Apply all suggestions without prompts (use with --apply)

preview.description: Show merchant context table before next steps

dry_run.description: Preview rules that would be added without modifying rules.yaml

file_id.description: Limit suggestions to transactions imported from a specific file_id

privacy.description: Privacy profile for JSON output: raw, redacted, or compact

tag_after.description: Re-tag transactions after applying rules (default: True)

tools.name: rules.test
tools.description: Dry-run a single rule against existing transactions without writing changes.

tools.name: rules.validate
tools.description: Validate tagging rules for conflicts and issues.

strict.description: Fail fast on the first malformed rule instead of collecting all rule-load errors

tools.name: show
tools.description: Show transactions with optional filters.

tag.description: Filter by tag (exact match; scans all partitions when --month is omitted). Quote tags that contain spaces or brackets, e.g. --tag "[테스트]LLM서비스".

max_bytes.description: Maximum serialized JSON response size before truncating rows

tools.name: status
tools.description: Show current data status.

top.description: 상세 통계에서 보여줄 상위 항목 수

tools.name: tag
tools.description: Apply tagging rules to all transactions in CSV partitions.

edit.description: Inspect or edit a transaction's manual tags by row_hash

add_tag.description: Add one or more manual tags (repeatable)

remove_tag.description: Remove one or more manual tags (repeatable)

set_category.description: Persist a manual category override for category_final

set_note.description: Persist a row-level manual note without changing analysis tags

dry_run.description: Preview changes without writing to CSV files

tools.name: template.list
tools.description: List available query templates.

tools.name: template.run
tools.description: Run a SQL template with validated parameters.

param.description: Template parameter in key=value format. Repeat for multiple parameters.

output.description: Output format: table, csv, json, markdown, xlsx

file.description: Save output to file. Required when --output xlsx.

max_bytes.description: Maximum serialized JSON response size before truncating rows

tools.name: template.show
tools.description: Show template metadata and SQL definition.

tools.name: transfer
tools.description: Detect and pair internal transfers.

tools.name: update-agents
tools.description: Update AGENTS.md to the latest template version.

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Validate CSV partition files against the schema.

tools.name: version
tools.description: Show finjuice CLI version and data schema version.

tools.name: workspace.create
tools.description: Create a new workspace directory with symlinks.

tools.name: workspace.list
tools.description: List all active workspaces.

tools.name: workspace.open
tools.description: Open workspace in file manager.

tools.name: workspace.remove
tools.description: Remove a workspace directory (data remains safe).

tools.name: workspace.verify
tools.description: Verify workspace symlinks are valid.
